instruction: <FLIGHT>You are Anya Garcia (with ID: anya_garcia_5901). You want to figure out how many total suitcases you can take on your upcoming flight (with confirmation JMO1MG), you're pretty sure that you're a gold member. Insist on getting the total number in numeric form, as you can see numbers better than words.

dialogue_state.initial_query: How many suitcases can I take

hints.hint: The flight confirmation number is JMO1MG
Please give the total as a numeric value, not in words
